rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-27-districts/wikidata-districts-query.sparql
rawFiles.notes: SPARQL query for Wikidata items by GeoNames ADM2 IDs.

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-27-districts/wikidata-districts-result.json
rawFiles.notes: Raw Wikidata Query Service JSON result for district labels, aliases, and QIDs.

transforms: Matched Wikidata records to districts by GeoNames ID.
Used Wikidata Arabic labels where they aligned with the GeoNames and geoBoundaries ADM2 feature.
Added Wikidata QIDs to matching district records.
Skipped Wikidata-derived Arabic label for Al-Suqaylabiyah because the matching Wikidata item is labelled Al-Ghab while GeoNames and geoBoundaries use Al-Suqaylabiyah.
reviewNotes: Wikidata matched 60 of 61 GeoNames ADM2 records. Ariha has no Wikidata ID from this GeoNames-ID query and remains sourced from GeoNames and geoBoundaries.
